title: Frontend Engineer
summary: Build polished, performant user interfaces in React and Next.js — with a deep care for design fidelity and user experience.
responsibilities: Implement UI features in React, Next.js, and TypeScript
Partner with designers to ship pixel-accurate, accessible interfaces
Optimize performance, bundle size, and Core Web Vitals
Write tests and contribute to component libraries
Pair with backend engineers on API contracts
requirements: Strong skills in React, TypeScript, and modern CSS
Eye for design and attention to detail
Familiarity with state management, testing, and accessibility
